about.title: About basketch
about.intro: basketch compares the weekly grocery promotions across seven Swiss supermarkets — Migros, Coop, LIDL, ALDI, Denner, SPAR, Volg — and tells you which store wins this week, by category.

how_it_works.heading: How it works
how_it_works.step1: Every week we fetch the latest promotions from 7 Swiss supermarkets — check the freshness indicator on the deals page for the exact update time.
how_it_works.step2: We categorise every deal into Fresh, Long-life, or Household and calculate a weekly verdict.
how_it_works.step3: You see the verdict instantly. Browse all deals, or track your regular items for a personal comparison.

data_sources.heading: Data sources
data_sources.body: All deal data comes from aktionis.ch, a public Swiss deal aggregator since 2006.
data_sources.stores_label: Stores tracked: Migros, Coop, LIDL, ALDI, Denner, SPAR, Volg.
data_sources.note: We only use publicly available data. No scraping of protected websites. Deal data is refreshed weekly.

what_we_compare.heading: What we compare
what_we_compare.body: basketch compares weekly promotions, not regular shelf prices. Promotions change every week and are the reason you might switch stores. Regular prices are stable — you already know what milk costs.

privacy.heading: Privacy
privacy.bullet3: Email is optional and only used to find your list.

contact.heading: Contact & feedback
contact.body: Feedback welcome — basketch is a small Swiss project. Reach us at hello@basketch.app.
